name: Mountain Crest Acquisition Corp. V Unit
summary: Mountain Crest Acquisition Corp. V Unit consists of one share of Class A common stock and one right to receive one-tenth (1/10) of one share of Class A common stock upon consummation of an initial business combination. Mountain Crest Acquisition Corp. V is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC). The company's focus is on finding a suitable target for acquisition.
